commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
With a smile. That is, with all ease, and without making any effort. (Challoner)
Aquila has "grinning "to show displeasure. (St. Jerome)
Hebrew, "he strengthens the oppressor against the strong "so that those whom he pleases to chastise cannot escape.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: With a smile: That is, with all ease, and without making any effort.
